BRANCH.COMMENT: check member challenges exists or not

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: challenge exists, check if challenge is already in progress

LOOP.COMMENT: get member challenges within effective date

MAP.COMMENT: compare challenge effectives dates to eligibility effective date

BRANCH.COMMENT: check whether challenges are with in effective date

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: member challenges within effective date exists

LOOP.COMMENT: check for inprogress member challenges within effective date

INVOKE.COMMENT: get all comma separated challengecode from systemConfig rule table

BRANCH.COMMENT: check list of dependencycode exists or not

SEQUENCE.NAME: %challengeCodes%==%memberChallengesWthInEffDateList/challengeCode%
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: compare BRE list with input challenge code

INVOKE.NAME: true
INVOKE.COMMENT: call challenge periods api call where input challenge start date is in between challenge_periods.period_effective_from and period_effective_to

INVOKE.NAME: $default
INVOKE.COMMENT: call challenge periods api call where input challenge start date is in between challenge_periods.period_effective_from and monitoring_end_date
call challenge periods api call where input challenge start date is in between challenge_periods.period_effective_from and monitoring_end_date

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Existing call (fetch details without date compare)

SEQUENCE.NAME: %responseListSize%>0&&%results/status%=='200'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: challenge periods with status inprogress exists

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to retrieve challenge periods data from DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: no challenge period with status inprogress

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: member challenges within effective date dosent exist, set challengeInProgress to false

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: member challenges dosent exists, set challengeInProgress to false
